testcase.name: test_mudras_cache_header

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected cache-control with max-age=3600, got: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate assert 'max-age=3600' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_restored_endpoints.py:184: in test_mudras_cache_header assert 'max-age=3600' in cache_control, f"Expected cache-control with max-age=3600, got: {cache_control}" E AssertionError: Expected cache-control with max-age=3600, got: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate E assert 'max-age=3600' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'
